findings.criterion: Every claim in the package is traceable to the change summary or verification report - no new claims appear here.
findings.evidence: runs/20260706-0307-sdlc-toy-cli/stages/deliver/artifacts/delivery.md (preamble, '## Release and rollback', '## Knowledge gaps') relays two items of operational context found in neither declared input (implement/artifacts/change_summary.md, verify/artifacts/verification_report.md): the working branch name 'claude/agentic-magnetic-harness-rbpq8c' and the expectation that the harness orchestrator commits/pushes at run end. The artifact itself discloses both as unverified external context, marks them as 'reported'/'expected' rather than asserted, and instructs the releaser to confirm the branch independently. All other spot-checked claims and every evidence pointer resolve to real sections of the two inputs (verification_report: Environment, R1a, R1b, R2, R3, R4, R5, Negative cases, Test suite, Gaps; change_summary: Steps 1-3, Deviations, Test coverage). Whether disclosed-and-hedged external context counts as a prohibited 'new claim' is a judgment call outside mechanical scope; recorded here for the judgment validators.
findings.suggested_fix: If strict traceability is required, remove the two externally-sourced items (branch name and orchestrator-commits expectation) or have the orchestrator inject them via a declared input; otherwise the existing unverified-context disclosure stands.

summary: PASS. (a) Declared output exists and is well-formed: artifacts/ contains exactly delivery.md (237 lines, non-empty, valid markdown); no undeclared files, including hidden files. (b) All seven required sections present in the declared order: '# Delivery', '## Summary', '## What changed and why', '## Evidence', '## Release and rollback', '## Risks and follow-ups', '## Knowledge gaps' (one subsection '### Release gate checklist' under Release and rollback, permissible). (c) All five acceptance criteria addressed: SUMMARY block carries what-changed/why/files/verification/risks filled from cited artifacts; plain-language narrative present (quality deferred to persona validator); traceability addressed with all evidence pointers resolving to real sections of the two declared inputs (one minor finding on two disclosed, explicitly-unverified items of external release context); all three verification_report Gaps items carried forward visibly as Risks and follow-ups items 1-3 with the R5 caveat also flagged in the Evidence table; release procedure and concrete rollback commands (pre-commit and post-commit paths, trigger, time, data considerations) stated. Checklist policies/gates/release.md: all eight items explicitly dispositioned in the Release gate checklist table - Tests pass (Met, evidence pointers), Build (N/A, no build step), Migration (N/A, no data/schema), Rollback (Met, concrete), Monitoring (N/A with reasoning plus on-demand substitute), Known risks (Met, six items), Post-launch validation (Met, fresh-clone check), Rollout appropriateness (Met, single-step justified). No item silent.
